name: 28"x84" Floral Persian Runner Rug Ivory - Threshold™
description:
Add textured flair and soft comfort to your home with this Floral Persian Runner Rug from Threshold™. Showcasing an allover floral Persian pattern in an ivory hue for a timeless, eye-catching look, this rectangular runner rug features a woven polyester construction for a soft feel underfoot. Plus, the low pile height makes it super easy to clean, making it a great pick for high-traffic areas like your kitchen, living room or entryway.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
